name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: At 7615 N 56th St in Tampa, FL, Swift Title Loans provides same-day title loans and cash advances.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates at 7615 N 56th St #1 in Tampa, FL, a standalone storefront in the north Tampa area near 56th Street. This location is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 5 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 2 PM, providing convenient access for working Tampa residents and weekend visitors. The storefront serves Tampa borrowers who need fast title loans or payday advances without the delays of traditional banks.

At this Tampa location, Swift Title Loans offers title-secured loans, payday loans, and cash advances for immediate financial needs. The staff can explain loan terms, answer questions about rates and eligibility, and process applications on the spot. Call +1 813-491-1430 to speak with a loan officer, ask about what documents you'll need, or schedule a visit to this N 56th St branch in Tampa.

If you're a Tampa, FL resident facing an unexpected expense, Swift Title Loans at this location often approves and funds loans within hours. Bring a government-issued ID, proof of income, and your vehicle title if applying for a title loan. The company has built a track record for transparent terms and fast funding across its Florida locations.
pros: Explicitly accepts bad credit and past bankruptcies with no stated minimum score
Same-day funding available for applications submitted by noon
You keep your car and continue using it during the repayment period
Wide loan range from $100 up to $50,000 to cover varying needs
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm Mon–Fri) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
256-bit SSL and TLS security on online applications
In-person staff described in reviews as patient and transparent about loan terms
cons: No APR, fee schedule, or repayment term information disclosed on the website
Title loans carry repossession risk — defaulting means losing your vehicle
Single Memphis location only; no branches or fully remote lending option confirmed
No mobile app for managing or tracking payments (flagged by multiple customers)
Closed Sundays; limited options if emergency arises over the weekend
best_for: Memphis-area vehicle owners who need same-day cash and have bad credit
Borrowers with past bankruptcies who cannot qualify for unsecured loans
Consumers needing amounts too large for payday loans but ineligible for bank personal loans
Borrowers comfortable with in-person service and a local lender relationship
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis residents who own a paid-off or nearly paid-off vehicle, need cash quickly, and have exhausted conventional credit options due to bad credit or bankruptcy. The main caveat is that the website discloses no interest rates or fees — borrowers should request full APR and repayment terms before signing, as title loans commonly carry triple-digit APRs and repossession is the consequence of default.
services: Title loans for borrowers with past bankruptcies
In-person loan processing at Memphis location
Vehicle title return upon full repayment
Loan term and paperwork consultation with staff
meta_description: Swift Title Loans at 7615 N 56th St, Tampa, FL. Same-day title loans and payday advances.
